title: proserpinaca × intermedia
intro: Proserpinaca × intermedia, also known as water spinach or swamp spinach, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Proserpinaca palustris and Ipomoea aquatica. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Proserpinaca × intermedia include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
